overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a dark service alley behind a parking structure, passing through an underpass, and emerging onto a vibrant neon-lit downtown street with digital billboards, moving traffic, and pedestrians. The camera follows a character wearing a cowboy hat through the rain-slicked urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley behind parking structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow dark alley with debris, keeping close to the parking garage wall

entered.detail: tall concrete parking structure with multiple open levels dominating the right side
plain concrete wall with some graffiti on the left side of the alley
scattered garbage bags and debris accumulated along the left wall
warm orange light source illuminating the distant end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dark service alley enclosed by a multi-story parking garage on the right and a concrete wall on the left. The ground is littered with debris and trash. Warm orange light glows in the distant exit of the alley, providing the only illumination in this empty, sheltered space.

events.description: approaching the exit of the underpass, bright neon lights from the main street become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the illuminated street exit, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure overhead
several vehicles parked along the right side under the overpass
elevated highway or monorail track running overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an underpass beneath an elevated highway, transitioning from the narrow alley to a slightly more open area with parked cars. Concrete pillars support the overhead structure while distant neon lights signal the approach to the main street ahead.

events.description: exits the dark underpass into a brightly lit urban street with neon billboards and wet pavement
futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a busy downtown street, observing the neon signs and passing traffic

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisements and corporate signage on building facades
tall modern building with glass windows and multiple levels
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting the neon lights
metal roll-down shutters covering ground-level shops
tall modern street light illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant downtown street bathed in neon light. Tall buildings line both sides with large digital billboards, while futuristic vehicles drive along the wet asphalt road. The camera walks along the sidewalk past closed storefronts with metal shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with stairs and digital advertisements

events.description: approaching a plaza area with outdoor stairs and a group of NPCs standing guard

agents.ego_description: walking past a plaza area with stairs, passing NPCs in tactical gear and a character in a cowboy hat

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs in tactical gear standing on the stairs
character wearing a cowboy hat and vest walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to a building entrance with red trim
large digital advertisement screen displaying REAL WATER with a man's face
tall palm trees planted in the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a pedestrian plaza featuring wide outdoor stairs on the left where NPCs in tactical gear stand guard. A prominent digital billboard advertising REAL WATER stands in the center of the plaza, surrounded by palm trees. A character in a cowboy hat walks ahead on the wet pavement as the camera continues down the street.

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and digital billboards, observing the traffic

entered.detail: large digital advertisement for AVANTE with a vehicle displayed
digital sign displaying CIRRUS in blue neon letters
covered pedestrian bridge or transit line running between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the commercial boulevard, passing the plaza and approaching an area dense with overhead digital billboards including advertisements for AVANTE and CIRRUS. An elevated walkway crosses overhead between buildings while various vehicles, including a blue sports car, drive along the multi-lane street. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dark service alley into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins in a narrow corridor enclosed by a parking garage and concrete walls, moving through debris toward a distant orange glow. As the camera passes through a concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway, the space opens up and the dim lighting shifts toward the vibrant colors of the city ahead. The scene then expands onto a rain-slicked downtown street lined with towering digital billboards and futuristic traffic, passing closed storefronts before entering a pedestrian plaza where guards in tactical gear stand near palm trees and a Real Water advertisement. Finally, the camera follows a character in a cowboy hat further down the commercial boulevard, moving beneath overhead walkways and dense advertisements for Avante and Cirrus as the wet pavement reflects the brilliant city lights.
